prestazioni: Turbocharger upgrade to a Garrett GTX3076R Gen II with a custom 0.82 A/R turbine housing for the **Skyactiv-G 2.5T PY-VPTS** engine, paired with a PTP Turbo Manifold (304 stainless steel, equal-length design) to optimize spool and reduce lag while targeting 380-420whp on E30-E50 ethanol blends with a Cobb Accessport v3 (Stage 2+ tune, custom dyno-optimized for this setup).

Full bolt-on fuel system overhaul: Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors, Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup (with -8AN lines and XRP fittings), and a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump with a Fore Innovations surge tank (4L capacity) to prevent fuel starvation during aggressive cornering or high-G launches.

Suspension and handling package: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (CX-4-specific valving, 80mm stroke front/70mm rear), Whiteline front sway bar (24mm adjustable) with poly bushings, and Cusco 2-way LSD (28-spline, 1.5/2.0 bias ratio) paired with Powerflex Black Series subframe bushings to eliminate torque steer and improve mid-corner adjustability.
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (CX-4-specific, carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear bumper with integrated diffuser) paired with a custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap (with satin clear coat for UV protection) and aggressive 15mm spacers (Hubcentric, 5x114.3) to fill the arches with Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (19x9.5 +22 front, 19x10.5 +30 rear, 5x114.3).

Full custom aero package: Veilside Fortune III-style front bumper lip (carbon fiber, CX-4-specific mold), custom 3D-printed rear wing (dual-element, 1,200mm span, adjustable angle of attack) with integrated Gurney flaps, and a Seibon carbon fiber hood (with functional vents to reduce underhood temps).

Interior overhaul: Bride Zeta III bucket seats (CX-4-specific mounting brackets, FIA-approved), Takata Drift Series 4-point harnesses, custom Alcantara-wrapped dashboard (with contrast stitching in Mazda Soul Red), and a full carbon fiber trim kit (door cards, center console, and shift boot) paired with a Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel (suede, 6-bolt pattern) and NRG quick-release hub.
